findings.evidence: In the PDF, the 'Marine Resources Fund Balance' table has a solid black horizontal line between the table header and the rest of the rows, and another at the bottom of the table. In the HTML, these lines are missing.
The column headers in the PDF table on page 3 are centered, but in the HTML they are left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 4 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 5 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 6 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 7 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 8 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 9 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 10 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 11 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 12 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 13 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 14 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 15 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.
In the PDF, the numerical data in the table on page 16 is right-aligned. In the HTML, the data is left-aligned.

findings.description: The HTML document uses multiple <h1> tags for the title lines and relies on bold paragraph text for all subsequent section headings rather than semantic heading tags (<h2>, <h3>, etc.).
findings.evidence:
The HTML begins with two consecutive

tags: '

Coastal Recreational Fishing License

\n

Sales Update

'. Following this, major structural sections are wrapped in paragraph and bold tags, such as '

Marine Resources Fund Balance

' and '

SUMMARY

', instead of utilizing proper heading hierarchy.
